reviews.summary: Beautiful and peaceful place to stay
reviews.positive: Very relaxing, staff were accommodating and helpful but not in your face. Beautiful location and surrounds
We love the hot water pool. Perfect dip after long driving journey. The staff are very helpfull and friendly. We will comeback again!
reviews.negative: Bathroom shower need more cleaning so the water would not spread everywhere. More lighting in the bathroom also would be perfect. Overall ok.

reviews.positive: Very good property for a very affordable price. For the price you get access to the nice hot pool and what I really enjoyed here was food. It was very affordable and surprisingly good, and I’m a picky eater. Would definitely recommend including breakfast. The massages were also very good
reviews.negative: Need to remember this property is located in a very traditional village, and Balinese people always celebrate something all the time. Noise is inevitable. On both nights there were ceremony music and prayers mixed with karaoke blasting from different houses. However, this did not affect our sleep as it was off by 9pm.

reviews.positive:
Ein wenig außerhalb der " stadt " . Man braucht auf jeden Fall nen scooter .. fußläufig ist da nix .
Der Pool ist der Hammer. 
RICHTIG groß.. Dazu noch nen heißen extra Pool.
Der Blick in die Natur ist großartig. 
Preis / Leistung passt .
